CustomField.formula: CASE(Activity_Factor__c, "Sedentary", Basal_Metabolic_Rate_BMR__c * 1.2, "Exercise 1-3", Basal_Metabolic_Rate_BMR__c * 1.3, "Exercise 4-5", Basal_Metabolic_Rate_BMR__c * 1.5, "Exercise 6-7", Basal_Metabolic_Rate_BMR__c * 1.7, Basal_Metabolic_Rate_BMR__c * 1.9)
CustomField.label: Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE)
